name: goatide-bridge
description: First-party bridge between the GoatIDE kernel sidecar and the editor process. Phase-4 Verification Canvas owner.

goatide.contracts.highImpactAllowlist.description: Path substrings that mark high-impact contract files; any cited ContractNode whose normalized contract_path contains one of these substrings forces the modal Verification Canvas tier. Path separators are normalized (Windows backslashes folded to forward slashes) before comparison.

goatide.session.priority.description: Current development session priority. Cited DecisionNodes whose derived_under_priority does not exact-match this value are flagged in the Verification Canvas as IntentDrift (Phase 7 Plan 07-05 / DRIFT-02).
enumDescriptions: Optimize for shipping speed; quality + safety tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for code quality; speed tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for runtime safety + correctness; speed + cost tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for runtime cost; quality tradeoffs accepted.
Block destructive saves entirely (file write refused).
Show the full Verification Canvas with ConfirmationPhrase (default; Mandate D).
goatide.saveGate.destructive.description: Per-workspace strictness for destructive saves. The 'suppress' option is intentionally excluded -- destructive saves ALWAYS require explicit confirmation (Mandate D).

enumDescriptions: Allow without UI (no canvas, no toast).
goatide.saveGate.highImpact.description: Per-workspace strictness for saves that touch a file under contracts.highImpactAllowlist.

enumDescriptions: Show the full Verification Canvas modal (default -- same as pre-Phase-17).
Show a compact status-bar message with the top 2 citations + 'Open full receipt' link (POLISH-04).
Apply silently (no UI; identical to current 'silent' tier behavior).
goatide.saveGate.benign.description: Per-workspace UI strictness for benign-tier saves (silent + inline classifications).

walkthroughs.title: GoatIDE — Understanding the Verification Canvas
walkthroughs.description: Learn how GoatIDE's bitemporal graph surfaces rationale for every code change.

steps.title: What Is the Verification Canvas?
steps.description: GoatIDE intercepts every save and shows a Verification Canvas with the rationale for your change.

steps.title: Reading a Reasoning Receipt
steps.description: Every save produces a Receipt listing the cited ConstraintNodes (Explicit rules) and DecisionNodes (recorded choices).

steps.title: IntentDrift — When Your Save Conflicts With Recorded Intent
steps.description: If your save cites a DecisionNode whose session priority doesn't match yours, GoatIDE shows an IntentDrift badge. The save still proceeds — IntentDrift is informational, not blocking.

steps.title: Explore the Graph Inspector
steps.description: Open the Graph Inspector to see your project's rationale graph as a time-travelable visualization. [Open Graph Inspector](command:goatide.openGraphInspector)
